title: helm: Fix file descriptor leak in createFullPath
author: YadavAkhileshh

findings.description: O_TRUNC flag included even though the function is only called after confirming the file does not exist. Omitting O_TRUNC (use os.O_CREATE|os.O_WRONLY) would be more precise, avoiding accidental clobber of a file created between the Stat and OpenFile calls.
Clean fix of the fd leak. Switching from os.Create (implicit 0666) to os.OpenFile with defaultNewConfigFileMode (0o644) is a minor security improvement.
